title: Noun にして初めて
titleEn: Expresses only when/after... for the first time
explanation: Dùng để nói chỉ sau khi đạt đến Noun hoặc ở hoàn cảnh Noun thì lần đầu tiên mới nhận ra, hiểu được hoặc xảy ra điều gì. Cấu trúc: Noun + にして初めて.
explanationEn: The phrase Noun にして初めて is used to express a sense of realization or experience that only came about or was felt after reaching that particular stage or status. In English, it could be translated as only when/after... for the first time
editorialSources: Hanabira grammar JSON (source import)
JLPT Vietnam / JLPT Sensei Vietnam (manual QA reference only)
JLPT Global / JLPT Sensei / Practice Japanese (manual QA reference only)

title: Noun にすら
titleEn: Expresses the concept of even; even in, even as, even to
explanation: Dùng để nhấn mạnh “ngay cả Noun cũng”, thường nhằm cho thấy mức độ bất ngờ hoặc cực đoan. Sắc thái trang trọng hơn にも. Cấu trúc: Noun + にすら.
explanationEn: The 〜にすら grammar point is used to show surprise that an action or situation applies even to the noun in question. It can be translated into English as even in, even as, or even to. Its often used with negative or unexpected statements, emphasizing that even in this particular case something cant or doesnt happen
editorialSources: Hanabira grammar JSON (source import)
JLPT Vietnam / JLPT Sensei Vietnam (manual QA reference only)
JLPT Global / JLPT Sensei / Practice Japanese (manual QA reference only)

title: Noun にとどまらず～も
titleEn: This expresses the idea of not only...but also, not stopping at
structure: Noun + にとどまらず + Noun + も
structureEn: Noun + にとどまらず + Noun + も
explanation: Dùng để nói phạm vi không dừng lại ở Noun mà còn lan sang điều khác. Có thể hiểu là “không chỉ Noun mà còn...”. Cấu trúc: Noun + にとどまらず + Noun + も.
explanationEn: This grammar point is used to express that something is not limited to just one thing (the thing before にとどまらず), but also includes other things (the thing after も). It can be translated as not only... but also... or not stopping at
editorialSources: Hanabira grammar JSON (source import)
JLPT Vietnam / JLPT Sensei Vietnam (manual QA reference only)
JLPT Global / JLPT Sensei / Practice Japanese (manual QA reference only)

title: Noun にひきかえ Noun は
titleEn: Represents in contrast to, as opposed to
structure: Noun 1 + にひきかえ + Noun 2 + は
structureEn: Noun 1 + にひきかえ + Noun 2 + は
explanation: Dùng để đối chiếu hai sự vật hoặc hai người, nhấn mạnh sự khác biệt rõ rệt giữa A và B. Thường dùng khi một bên tốt hơn hoặc tệ hơn bên kia. Cấu trúc: Noun 1 + にひきかえ + Noun 2 + は.
explanationEn: The grammar point Noun にひきかえ Noun は is used in Japanese to express contrast or opposition between two nouns. It translates to as opposed to or in contrast to in English. The first noun represents what is being contrasted against and the second noun represents the main subject
editorialSources: Hanabira grammar JSON (source import)
JLPT Vietnam / JLPT Sensei Vietnam (manual QA reference only)
JLPT Global / JLPT Sensei / Practice Japanese (manual QA reference only)

title: Noun にもまして
titleEn: This expresses Even more than; exceeding
explanation: Dùng để nói điều phía sau vượt hơn Noun về mức độ. Có thể hiểu là “hơn cả”, “còn hơn”. Cấu trúc: Noun + にもまして.
explanationEn: The Nounにもまして grammar point is used to express that something is even more or exceeds the noun that it’s being compared to. It translates to expressions like even more than or exceeding in English. It is used when making a comparison to emphasize the greater degree of something
editorialSources: Hanabira grammar JSON (source import)
JLPT Vietnam / JLPT Sensei Vietnam (manual QA reference only)
JLPT Global / JLPT Sensei / Practice Japanese (manual QA reference only)

title: Noun によらず
explanation: Dùng để nói không bị phụ thuộc hoặc không phân biệt theo Noun. Có thể hiểu là “bất kể”, “không kể”. Cấu trúc: Noun + によらず.
explanationEn: The ～によらず grammar point is used to express the meaning regardless of or irrespective of in English. It is used when the outcome does not change regardless of differences in conditions
editorialSources: Hanabira grammar JSON (source import)
JLPT Vietnam / JLPT Sensei Vietnam (manual QA reference only)
JLPT Global / JLPT Sensei / Practice Japanese (manual QA reference only)

title: Noun に先駆けて
titleEn: Meaning ahead of, before, or preceding in time
explanation: Dùng để nói một việc diễn ra trước người khác, nơi khác hoặc thời điểm thông thường. Sắc thái “đi trước”, “mở đầu”. Cấu trúc: Noun + に先駆けて.
explanationEn: The grammar point 〜に先駆けて indicates something happening ahead or before something else in terms of time. Typically used in written language or formal speech
editorialSources: Hanabira grammar JSON (source import)
JLPT Vietnam / JLPT Sensei Vietnam (manual QA reference only)
JLPT Global / JLPT Sensei / Practice Japanese (manual QA reference only)

title: Noun に即した Noun
titleEn: Expresses the idea of in accordance with, based on
explanation: Dùng để bổ nghĩa cho danh từ theo nghĩa “dựa trên”, “phù hợp với”, “bám sát” Noun. Mẫu này hay gặp trong văn bản chính sách, nghiên cứu hoặc hướng dẫn. Cấu trúc: Noun1 + に即した + Noun2.
explanationEn: The grammar point Noun に即した Noun is used to express the idea of something being done in accordance with or based on something else. Usually, the first noun is principle, rule, reality, etc. and the second noun could be action, method, plan, etc
editorialSources: Hanabira grammar JSON (source import)
JLPT Vietnam / JLPT Sensei Vietnam (manual QA reference only)
JLPT Global / JLPT Sensei / Practice Japanese (manual QA reference only)

title: Noun に即して Verb
titleEn: The grammar point Noun に即して Verb is used to mean to act in accordance with, in line with or based on
explanation: Dùng khi hành động được thực hiện dựa trên hoặc phù hợp với Noun. Có thể hiểu là “theo”, “bám sát”. Cấu trúc: Noun + に即して + Verb.
explanationEn: The formation Noun に即して Verb is used when someone is doing something based on or in accordance with some norms, rules, decisions or principles. This structure is often used in business or official contexts
editorialSources: Hanabira grammar JSON (source import)
JLPT Vietnam / JLPT Sensei Vietnam (manual QA reference only)
JLPT Global / JLPT Sensei / Practice Japanese (manual QA reference only)

title: Noun に言わせれば
titleEn: Expresses according to, if you ask, in the opinion of
explanation: Dùng để nêu ý kiến theo cách nhìn của Noun: “nếu hỏi Noun thì”. Sắc thái cho thấy nhận định này thuộc về người hoặc nhóm đó. Cấu trúc: Noun + に言わせれば.
explanationEn: The に言わせれば grammar point is used when we want to express someones opinion or viewpoint. It can be translated as according to, if you ask, or in the opinion of. This form is mostly used in formal or written language
editorialSources: Hanabira grammar JSON (source import)
JLPT Vietnam / JLPT Sensei Vietnam (manual QA reference only)
JLPT Global / JLPT Sensei / Practice Japanese (manual QA reference only)
